title: ExtraPlanets
body:
![ServerMiner Ad](https://i.gyazo.com/28c3a5fef87436bb685a30c033e40915.png)

Create your own Minecraft server with a single click from our partner ServerMiner: [Click Here](https://serverminer.com/) and get 20% off with promo MJRLegends. No technical knowledge required and instant setup!

# Public Discord Server for MJRLegends Projects: [Here](https://discord.gg/SBnvQHc) 
_(NOT FOR REPORTING OR TALKING ABOUT BUGS, PLEASE USE THE DISCORD FOR NON BUG HELP! AND THE ISSUE TRACKER FOR BUGS)_

# Mod Requirements:
**For 1.12.2 Version (Please report them [here](https://github.com/MJRLegends/ExtraPlanets/issues) and use [1.12.2] in the title):
Requires Galacticraft 4 Builds, (255 Build and higher) and Forge 14.23.1.2555 or higher & Requires MJRLegendsLib!**

**For 1.11.2 Version (Please report them [here](https://github.com/MJRLegends/ExtraPlanets/issues) and use [1.11.2] in the title):
Requires Galacticraft 4 Builds, (184 Build and higher) and Forge 13.20.1.2513 or higher & Requires MJRLegendsLib as of ExtraPlanets v0.5.0!**

**For 1.10.2 Version (Please report them [here](https://github.com/MJRLegends/ExtraPlanets/issues) and use [1.10.2] in the title):
Requires Galacticraft 4 Builds, (184 Build and higher) and Forge 12.18.3.2239 or higher & Requires MJRLegendsLib as of ExtraPlanets v0.8.6!**

**For 1.8.9 Version (Please report them [here](https://github.com/MJRLegends/ExtraPlanets/issues) and use [1.8] in the title):
Requires Galacticraft 4 Builds, (184 Build and higher) and Forge 11.15.1.1764 or higher & Requires MJRLegendsLib as of ExtraPlanets v1.1.9!**

**For 1.7.10 Version (Please report them [here](https://github.com/MJRLegends/ExtraPlanets/issues) and use [1.7] in the title):
Requires Galacticraft 3 Builds, (502 Build and higher) and Forge 10.13.4.1614!**

### This ExtraPlanets Radiation Calculator will help you work out how long you will last on a planet/moon based on a few variables, from 0% radiation damage to 100% radiation damage on the player https://mjrlegends.com/extraplanetsradiation.php
### 


# Features of the addon:
- 4-10 Tier Rockets
- Electric Rocket (1.8.9/1.10.2/1.11.2/1.12.2 only!)
- Custom Launch pads
- Custom Vehicles
- Multi Biome Systems for most Moons and Planets (MC 1.7.10 is currently missing one biome, but will be added very soon)
- Different Gravity/Temperature/Day Length for each Planet and Moon
- Dungeons Tier 4 -10(Pluto & Eris still is a Creeper Bosses, but they will be replaced very soon!)
- Tier 2 - 4 Thermal Armour (Tier 3 - 5 in 1.8.9/1.10.2/1.11.2/1.12.2! Due to GC adding Tier 2)
- Custom Tools for most materials
- Custom Ores on every Planets and Moons
- Custom Config options (Including Compatibility options for other GC Addons)
- Custom Armor for most materials
- Villages on All Planets
- Villages on All Moons (v1.7.10 only!)
- Custom Batteries
- Custom Non Boss Mobs(Entities) (v1.7.10 only!)
- Custom Achievements
- Space Stations for each of the Planets
- Custom Space Suits Tier 1 - 4, Including Gravity Boots (MC 1.8.9/1.10.2/1.11.2/1.12.2 only!)
- Custom Radiation and Pressure System for planets, including onscreen displays (MC 1.8.9/1.10.2/1.11.2/1.12.2 only!)
- Custom Machines to support Radiation and Pressure System
- Upgraded versions of some of the Galacticraft Machines
- Extended Galacticraft Galaxy Map Screen with Extra Information
- Other Galaxies/Galaxies Selector (MC 1.8.9/1.10.2/1.11.2/1.12.2 only!)


# Mod Compatibility Features: 
- Forge Microblocks support (v1.7.10 only!)
- NEI/JEI Support
- Extreme Reactors Support (1.10.2/1.11.2/1.12.2 only!)
- Craft Tweaker Support (1.12.2 Only!) See Here for Methods
- Dynamic Surroundings Support - via official config files here
- Modular Power Suits Compact, adds pressure and radiation modules to apply to power suit
- More Planets Rocket Crusher Support
- Planet Progressions support with Custom Celestial Map Screen



# Another Galacticraft addon Compatibility Support:
- MC 1.7.10 - https://docs.mjrlegends.com/ExtraPlanets/1.7.10compact/
- MC 1.12.2 - https://docs.mjrlegends.com/ExtraPlanets/1.12.2compact/
- MC 1.8.9-1.11.2 - https://docs.mjrlegends.com/ExtraPlanets/1.8-1.11compact/ 



# Planets included in addon:
- Mercury
- Venus (1.7.10 only! Due to GC have added Venus in 1.8.9/1.10.2/1.11.2/1.12.2 versions!)
- Ceres
- Jupiter
- Saturn
- Uranus
- Neptune
- Pluto
- Eris
- Kepler 22b
- Haumea - (Added for visual purposes on Celestial Map Screen)
- Kuiper Belt - (Added for visual purposes on Celestial Map Screen)
- MakeMake - (Added for visual purposes on Celestial Map Screen)
- Kepler 47b - (Added for visual purposes on Celestial Map Screen)
- Kepler 47c - (Added for visual purposes on Celestial Map Screen)
- Kepler 62b - (Added for visual purposes on Celestial Map Screen)
- Kepler 62c - (Added for visual purposes on Celestial Map Screen)
- Kepler 62d - (Added for visual purposes on Celestial Map Screen)
- Kepler 62e - (Added for visual purposes on Celestial Map Screen)
- Kepler 62f - (Added for visual purposes on Celestial Map Screen)
- Kepler 69b - (Added for visual purposes on Celestial Map Screen)
- Kepler 69c - (Added for visual purposes on Celestial Map Screen)

# Moons included in addon:
- Neptune Moons:
  - Triton

- Uranus Moons:
  - Oberon
  - Titania

- Mars Moons:
  - Phobos
  - Deimos

- Jupiter Moons:
  - IO
  - Europa
  - Ganymede
  - Callisto

- Saturn Moons:
  - Rhea
  - Titan
  - Iapetus
